jaxlibxc
  • API Reference
  • jaxlibxc.Functional
  • View page source

jaxlibxc.Functional

The main user-facing class with a pylibxc-compatible interface.

class jaxlibxc.functional.Functional(name_or_id, spin='unpolarized')[source]

Bases: object

Exchange-correlation functional with pylibxc-compatible interface.

Usage:

func = Functional(“lda_x”, spin=”unpolarized”) out = func.compute({“rho”: rho}, do_exc=True, do_vxc=True) # out[“zk”], out[“vrho”]

property params
property family
property kind
get_number()[source]
get_name()[source]
get_family()[source]
get_kind()[source]
set_dens_threshold(val)[source]
set_sigma_threshold(val)[source]
set_tau_threshold(val)[source]
set_zeta_threshold(val)[source]
compute(inp, do_exc=True, do_vxc=False, do_fxc=False, do_kxc=False, do_lxc=False)[source]

Compute functional outputs.

Parameters:

  • inp – dict with ‘rho’ and optionally ‘sigma’, ‘lapl’, ‘tau’

  • do_exc – compute energy density zk

  • do_vxc – compute 1st derivatives

  • do_fxc – compute 2nd derivatives

  • do_kxc – compute 3rd derivatives (not yet implemented)

  • do_lxc – compute 4th derivatives (not yet implemented)

Returns:

dict with requested outputs
